name: rpglitch
description: RPGlitch - AI-powered storytelling platform for Perchance with comprehensive rules system for development

scripts.check: npm run lint && npm test && npm run build && npm run validate
scripts.lint: eslint --ext .js,.cjs,.mjs apps tests build/scripts --config eslint.config.mjs && stylelint "apps/**/*.{css,scss}" --config stylelint.config.js && htmlhint "apps/**/*.html" --config .htmlhintrc
scripts.lint:fix: eslint --ext .js,.cjs,.mjs apps tests build/scripts --config eslint.config.mjs --fix && stylelint "apps/**/*.{css,scss}" --config stylelint.config.js --fix && htmlhint "apps/**/*.html" --config .htmlhintrc
scripts.deploy: npm run build && echo '✅ Build complete! Copy build/output/RPGlitch-perchance.html to Perchance.'
scripts.rules:update: echo 'Use "update memory bank" to refresh memory bank files'
scripts.housekeeping: node build/scripts/combine-views.js repo recent && npm run lint

author: Glitch
